items.name: GameTopBar
items.doc:
GameTopBar — top chrome for Steam Deck / small-tier shell.
Height is fixed at `SteamSpacing.top-bar-height` (48px).

items.name: title
items.doc: Page or app title shown in the centre.

items.name: show-back
items.doc: Show the back button on the left.

items.name: back
items.doc: Fired when the back button is tapped.
